The periods of risk caused by Ganda are the following ; —
1) 16 years in the case of first quarter of Asvinl.
2) 8 years in the case of first quarter of Maghd.
3) 1 year in the case of Jyestha.
4) 4 years in the case of Citra and Miila.
5) 2 years in the case of Aslesa.
6) 1 year in the case of Revatl.
7) 2 months in the case of Uttaraphalguni.
8) 3 months in the case of Pusya.
9) 9 months in the case of Purvdfddhd (Hannful to the father).
10) 12 years in the case of Hast a (Do.)
11) Immediate danger to father in the case of Abhuktamula.
Should one born under Abhuktamula live, one makes one's
family illustrious, be wealthy and lord of a big army.
Exception to Gandadofa :—This Dosa would be harmful only
if the lunar month of birth be Jyestha, Afddha, Mdrgasirsa,
Pausa and Mdgha.
Pancamdrifta :— This peculiar Dosa is not met with in
Astrological works; but it is mentioned as a major fault in works
